title: Local-First AWS Development with LocalStack
description:
Enable local development without a live AWS account using LocalStack Community Edition.

## Current State
- docker-compose.yml configured with: sagemaker, bedrock, comprehend, lex, kendra, personalize
- Issue: Most AI/ML services (Bedrock, SageMaker) require LocalStack Pro

## LocalStack Community (Free) Services
- S3, DynamoDB, Lambda, SQS, SNS, Kinesis, API Gateway
- IAM (basic), CloudWatch (basic), CloudFormation

## LocalStack Pro (Paid) Services Required for AIF-C01
- Amazon Bedrock (AI/ML models)
- Amazon SageMaker (ML training/inference)
- Amazon Comprehend (NLP)
- Amazon Lex (Conversational AI)
- Amazon Kendra (ML search)
- Amazon Personalize (Recommendations)

## Scope
1. Update docker-compose for Community-compatible services
2. Create mock/stub services for Pro-only features
3. Document local-first development workflow
4. Add integration tests that work locally

title: Update docker-compose for LocalStack Community
description: Replace Pro-only services with Community alternatives or mocks

title: Create mock Bedrock service for local testing
description: Build a simple mock service that mimics Bedrock API for testing without AWS/LocalStack Pro

title: Multi-Cloud Certification Study Materials
description:
Research and organize study materials for cloud certifications across providers.

## Primary Focus: GCP AI Certifications
- Google Cloud Digital Leader (Entry-level, $99, 90 min)
- Google Cloud Machine Learning Engineer ($200, advanced)
- Focus on Vertex AI, BigQuery ML, TensorFlow on GCP

## Secondary: Azure AI Certifications
- Azure AI Fundamentals (AI-900)
- Azure AI Engineer Associate (AI-102)

## Tertiary: Oracle Cloud
- Oracle Cloud Infrastructure AI Foundations

## IBM (Low Priority)
- IBM AI Engineering Professional Certificate

## Goals
1. Create comparison matrix: AWS AIF-C01 vs GCP ML vs Azure AI
2. Identify overlapping concepts for cross-training
3. Build hands-on labs using free tiers
4. Track exam prep progress per certification

title: GCP Cloud Digital Leader exam prep
description: Entry-level GCP cert - 90 min, $99, covers GCP fundamentals and data/AI basics

title: GCP Machine Learning Engineer certification
description: Advanced GCP ML cert ($200) - Vertex AI, MLOps, BigQuery ML. Equivalent to AWS ML Specialty.
